heading: Effect of failure to pay administrative fees or premiums
label: 9058 Effect of failure to pay administrative fees or premiums

children.text: remains legally obligated to pay the administrative fee or premiums, as the case may be; and
may not receive dairy margin coverage payments until the fees or premiums are fully paid.

children.heading: Enforcement
children.label: b Enforcement
children.text: The Secretary may take such action as necessary to collect administrative fees and premium payments for participation in dairy margin coverage.
